expectations.text: Creates .ai-context/module-context.md from Template 1 before any code
expectations.evidence: Step 1 — Create `src/modules/notifications/.ai-context/module-context.md` / Use Template 1. Key specifics: port 8004... (preceded by 'Before writing any implementation code, complete all 10 setup steps')
Step 2 — Create `src/modules/notifications/.ai-context/domain-model-guide.md` / Use Template 2. Document: `Alert` entity, `AlertRule` entity, `AlertStatus` enum...
Step 3 — Add module entry to `/.ai-context/project-context.md` / Use Template 4 under `## System modules`: ### Notifications Module / **Status:** 📋 Planned
Step 4 — Add module entry to `/.ai-context/PROJECT_STRUCTURE_MAP.md` / Use Template 6 under `modules/` — all layers marked 📋, 0 tests, port 8004.
Step 10 — Add service block to `docker-compose.yml` / Copy the `analysis_engine` block, adjust name, port 8004, Dockerfile path, healthcheck URL.

expectations.text: Does not write entity/service code until context is set up
expectations.evidence: Before writing any implementation code, complete all 10 setup steps ... Ready to start on domain entities when you give the go-ahead.
